name: @ai-launchpad/browser
description: AI Launchpad for Oracle Browser Client MVP

scripts.test:knowledge: tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --types node --strict --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp/knowledge-test --rootDir src src/renderer/src/lib/knowledge.ts src/renderer/src/lib/knowledge.test.ts src/shared/documentIngestion.ts src/shared/documentIngestion.test.ts src/main/ociConfigProbe.ts src/main/ociConfigProbe.test.ts src/main/localCaptureStore.ts src/main/localCaptureStore.test.ts src/main/sqlclProbe.ts src/main/sqlclProbe.test.ts src/main/adbWalletProbe.ts src/main/adbWalletProbe.test.ts && node --test .tmp/knowledge-test/renderer/src/lib/knowledge.test.js .tmp/knowledge-test/shared/documentIngestion.test.js .tmp/knowledge-test/main/ociConfigProbe.test.js .tmp/knowledge-test/main/localCaptureStore.test.js .tmp/knowledge-test/main/sqlclProbe.test.js .tmp/knowledge-test/main/adbWalletProbe.test.js
